---
title: "Listing Example"
listing:
  type: grid
  table-hover: true
  sort: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, image]
  contents:
    - title: "Quantitative Data Analysis"
      path: https://agrogan1.github.io/teaching/quantitative-data-analysis/quantitative-data-analysis.html
      categories: [workflow, stats, Stata, R]
---
